name: cm-initiative-sector
description: CM INITIATIVE SECTOR — KP CM Priority Initiatives & Sector Tracking Platform (NestJS + React monolith)

scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.start: npm run ensure-build && prisma db push --skip-generate --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma && tsx backend/prisma/seed.ts && node backend/dist/main.js
